\tzpentry{ID5094}{Coupled Hamiltonian}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID5094 introduces Coupled Hamiltonian as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation}\r\n\t\t\\hat{H}_{coupling} = \\sum_{k,q} g_{k,q} \\left( \\hat{a}_k^\\dagger \\hat{b}_q + \\hat{a}_k \\hat{b}_q^\\dagger \\right)\r\n\t\t\\end{equation}
